name: QRadar Audit: Expensive Custom Properties
notes: This rule triggers when QRadar custom properties are expensive. Optimize those custom properties to reduce load in parsing and reduce a chance of unparsed events.
conditions_text: when the event matches QID is 38,750,138
TD_list: APPLY QRadar Audit: Expensive Custom Properties on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches QID is 38,750,138
RED_list: Event description: Detects when expensive custom properties detected in parsing. Optimize those properties to reduce load in parsing and reduce a chance of unparsed events.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Hostname (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
